failure_reason: Closed the fourth-arm gap for the supported JIT oracle-learning and metal-lane floor. The Form flattener now pre-registers same-source function signatures before lowering bodies, so forward helper calls and mutual recursion lower into the same function table as the regular walkers. form-lower, form-lower-rec, jit-metal-lanes, and jit-oracle-learning now pass the fkwu fourth-arm gate; the metal-plane audit requires those four-way proofs before emitting macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF clang oracle receipts.
